case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A VS. DALE S DONAIRE

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15271079), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A SERVED SEP-25-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DONAIRE, DALE S
SHERIFF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET (CONFIDENTIAL)

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT DALE DONAIRE IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE SHERIFF IS TO RELEASE $1200 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE REMAINDER MUST BE RETURNED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR DALE DONAIRE. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: BRENDA CROW, CSR#10503, BCROW@SFTC.ORG, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kari Morris, Esq. 800-637-6922 of Law Offices of Steve Levy for Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK through Court Call.
Dale Donaire, 415-359-813, Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT DALE DONAIRE.

Granted in part and Denied in part. The Sheriff is to release $1200 to the Judgment Creditor and the remainder must be returned to the Judgment Debtor Dale Donaire.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Brenda Crow, CSR#10503, bcrow@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Off Calendar
